title: GPU Capability Map
description: Schema for config/compute-profiles/gpu-capability-map.yaml. Validated at emit time — if the map drifts from this shape the emitter errors at load rather than the runtime agent misrouting.

mig_profile.description: Plan §S5.49 — Multi-Instance GPU slice the method fits in (e.g. "3g.40gb" on H100). Null/absent means the method needs a full GPU. SLURM consumers map this to `--gres=gpu:<type>_<profile>:1`.

mps_compatible.description: Plan §S5.49 — true when CUDA MPS sharing is appropriate (short-running, fits comfortably in fraction of device memory, no MIG required). MIG and MPS are mutually exclusive on the same device.

parabricks_route.description: Plan §S5.49 — true when the GPU implementation is a Parabricks pipeline. Triggers the Parabricks AMI path (S15.11) and the appropriate `pbrun ...` invocation.
